title: heliophila africana
intro: Heliophila africana, also known as the African yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Heliophila africana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit potential antitumor activity. Herbal preparations of Heliophila africana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
